{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175128FF6D12F0F829707B3E22"}"},"total":3393},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7320623891357385523","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好，符合我的胃口。这次是真正的奥特文，而且丝毫不比TV差，可能是我脑子里有画面吧，我觉得很棒。
比起圆谷那种开局就有觉悟不同，这里把主角的整个心理过程都写得很好。毕竟这不是奥特世界，面对未知的恐惧，写得很好。
而那些不满意男主的，都是一些完美龙傲天人设和爽文看多了的傻子。不用去理会，毕竟那些人对这本书起不了任何作用。
而真正喜欢这本书的读者，都是默默追更的，作者你要分得清楚啊。
期待后面的进化红奈剧情。加油，老杨！","text_exts":[{"e":125,"s":122,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000288707B3E22%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227320623891357385523%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227307283808938626110%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704466760,"group_id":"7307283808938626110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我不想扑街啊~求求啦~~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N81HdZ/dBsG+0uiXRWn2gmfM9o/hswnQOd7uZoaxWwLu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1174714302336286","user_name":"用户11747143"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1174714302336286","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307283808938626110","book_info":{"abstract":"【原创世界观+偏现实+非爽文+无后宫+不无敌+成长自愈流】的奥特衍生同人。
【写的是故事，不是男主爽文，请不要带着爽文视角阅读，谢谢。】
【当光芒选择一个自卑，社恐，有些交流障碍，自闭倾向的人时。是治愈？还是致郁？】
7年前的天空极光出现之后，少年便被同一个梦境缠绕至今...
7年后...天空再次出现诡异的极光，一只巨大的怪兽从天而降....
神秘的山字石柱突然出现在少年的面前....
宛如心脏跳动般的光芒在少年面前闪烁....
一个如飞鸟一般的印记显现....
那是....对少年的救赎，还是对少年的诅咒。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c6c5657b003c63df677f748126f47f8","author":"木杨人","author_id":"","book_id":"7307283808938626110","book_name":"当信念传递到万家灯火","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7307283812583473726","read_count":"18805","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1547187"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"659","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,奥特同人,单女主,同人,1v1,无后宫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/363df421fe923104a6e2e4bf7aeb53be~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184288&x-signature=m2Af86Uyt%2B8M9tsaYVYMLRHMXG4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109665552963","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"174"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175128FF6D12F0F829707B3E22"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16444,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":96738,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":26238},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1704466817,"author_reply_time":1704466822,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7392116274174853913","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过最不一样的奥特文了，全书讲述了主角的经历和性格的改变，番茄上的大多奥特文不是无敌就是龙傲曼，一直无脑的爽，这本书在人物性格刻画上非常的饱满，书中的坑也是基本上填完了，与我看过另一本奈克瑟斯《光的复制》感觉完全不一样，那本从开头刀到尾，虽说这本有点，但也是很甜的了。希望作者大大加油！期待你的新书[送心][送心][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":95,"text":"奈克瑟斯","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%88%E5%85%8B%E7%91%9F%E6%96%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774000288707B3E22%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227392116274174853913%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227307283808938626110%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%88%E5%85%8B%E7%91%9F%E6%96%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721113427,"group_id":"7307283808938626110","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"励志读遍天下小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1R4f/ZX3axBPrVx0fAVgSDfo8gcmzxfsuHnU2rxICdG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d035433ee0f444a29b62e4d98849f291~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535828&x-signature=bdDMHKyxtKDfmF4KqeUDOKRe%2F%2B0%3D","user_id":"3364961734635325"
